extract: The Member Card (Japanese: メンバーズカード Member's Card) is an event-exclusive Key Item available in Pokémon Platinum, Brilliant Diamond, and Shining Pearl. In Pokémon Platinum, it was the second of the four event items in the Sinnoh-based games, preceded in its distribution by the Secret Key, and followed by Oak's Letter and the then-unreleased Azure Flute.
